metadata.description: Consolidated prompt routing training corpus. Labels: low=Haiku, mid=Sonnet, high=Opus. Sources: handcrafted coding prompts (6 JSON files across 3 model families). Chat log prompts (labeled_history.csv) excluded pending quality review — see AGENTS.md for details.

tier_definitions.low: Simple factual lookups, syntax questions, single-step tasks, short snippets
tier_definitions.mid: Multi-step tasks, moderate analysis, code with context, debugging, integrations
tier_definitions.high: Architecture decisions, security analysis, distributed systems, complex algorithms, scale

metadata.pending: labeled_history.csv contains 594 anonymized chat-log prompts pending curation for v3.0
